evals.name: specific-issue-number
evals.expected_output: Resolves issue #42, reads it with gh issue view, checks for blocking labels, then initializes a koto workflow with `koto init issue_42 --template ... --var ISSUE_NUMBER=42 --var ARTIFACT_PREFIX=issue_42`. Submits entry evidence with mode: issue_backed. Enters the koto execution loop using `koto next issue_42` to advance through states.
expectations: Agent plans to read issue #42 using gh issue view
Agent plans to check for blocking labels before proceeding
Agent plans to run koto init with --template flag and --var ISSUE_NUMBER=42
Agent plans to set ARTIFACT_PREFIX to issue_42 in koto init
Agent plans to submit entry evidence with mode issue_backed
Agent plans to enter the koto execution loop using koto next with the workflow name
Agent plans to detect repo visibility from CLAUDE.md or infers from path

evals.name: milestone-auto-select
evals.expected_output: Lists open issues in milestone 3, identifies dependency relationships, selects the lowest-numbered unblocked issue, then proceeds with the full workflow for that issue. Reports which issue was selected and why.
expectations: Agent plans to recognize M3 as a milestone reference, not an issue number
Agent plans to list open issues in milestone 3 using gh
Agent plans to check dependency sections of milestone issues for blocking
Agent plans to select the lowest-numbered unblocked issue
Agent plans to report which issue was selected and why
Agent plans to proceed to koto init with the selected issue number

evals.name: auto-mode-flag
evals.expected_output: Runs in automatic execution mode. At decision points (W1, W2), follows the decision protocol from references/decision-protocol.md instead of asking the user. Creates wip/work-on_15_decisions.md to record any decisions made. Safety gates (W3, W4) still block and require user input. Uses koto orchestration throughout.
expectations: Agent plans to detect the --auto flag from the arguments
Agent plans to reference auto execution mode or decision protocol
Agent plans to use koto decisions record for decision capture
Agent plans to use koto orchestration (koto init / koto next)
Agent plans to distinguish between decision points (W1/W2 auto) and safety gates (W3/W4 blocking)
Agent plans to read issue #15 with gh issue view

evals.name: blocking-label-needs-design
evals.expected_output: Reads issue #8 which has a needs-design label. Detects the blocking label from the project's label vocabulary, displays a routing message explaining the issue requires a design document before implementation, and stops execution without initializing a koto workflow.
expectations: Agent reads issue #8 with gh issue view
Agent checks for blocking labels from the project label vocabulary
Agent identifies needs-design as a blocking label
Agent displays a routing message about the blocking label
Agent stops execution without initializing a koto workflow
Agent does NOT attempt koto init

evals.name: needs-triage-label
evals.expected_output: Reads issue #23 which has a needs-triage label. Checks the project's label vocabulary for routing options. If a triage workflow is defined in the extension file, invokes it. Otherwise, asks the user whether to proceed directly or reclassify the issue first.
expectations: Agent reads issue #23 with gh issue view
Agent detects the needs-triage label
Agent checks the project label vocabulary in CLAUDE.md
Agent checks the extension file for a triage workflow definition
Agent either invokes a triage workflow or asks user whether to proceed
Agent treats needs-triage differently from blocking labels like needs-design

evals.name: resume-interrupted-session
evals.expected_output: Checks for an active koto workflow with `koto workflows`. Finds an existing workflow, resumes with `koto next <workflow-name>`.
expectations: Agent checks for active koto workflows using koto workflows
Agent attempts to resume an existing workflow rather than starting fresh
Agent uses koto next with the workflow name to resume
Agent does NOT run koto init if an active workflow is detected
Agent understands that gates auto-advance past completed work

evals.name: milestone-all-blocked
evals.expected_output: Lists open issues in milestone 5, checks dependency sections, finds that all issues are blocked by open dependencies. Reports which issues are blocked and by what, then stops without starting any implementation.
expectations: Agent plans to recognize M5 as a milestone reference
Agent plans to list open issues in milestone 5
Agent plans to check dependency sections of each issue
Agent plans to determine that all issues are blocked by open dependencies
Agent plans to report which issues are blocked and by what
Agent plans to stop without starting any implementation or koto workflow

evals.name: issue-url-input
evals.expected_output: Parses the GitHub issue URL to extract issue number 71, reads the issue with gh issue view, checks for blocking labels, detects repo visibility from CLAUDE.md, loads the appropriate content governance skill, and initializes a koto workflow for the issue.
expectations: Agent plans to parse the GitHub URL to extract issue number 71
Agent plans to use gh issue view to read the issue
Agent plans to detect repo visibility from CLAUDE.md or path inference
Agent plans to load the appropriate content governance skill based on visibility
Agent plans to initialize a koto workflow with the extracted issue number
Agent plans to set ARTIFACT_PREFIX to issue_71

evals.name: free-form-mode
evals.prompt: /work-on fix the login timeout -- no issue needed
evals.expected_output: Detects free-form input (no issue number), initializes koto with `koto init task_fix-login-timeout --template ... --var ARTIFACT_PREFIX=task_fix-login-timeout`. Submits entry evidence with mode: free_form and the task description.
expectations: Agent plans to detect free-form input (no issue number or milestone)
Agent plans to use ARTIFACT_PREFIX=task_fix-login-timeout or similar slug
Agent plans to submit entry evidence with mode free_form
Agent plans to include the task description in entry evidence
Agent plans to initialize koto with --template and without ISSUE_NUMBER var
Agent plans to NOT run gh issue view for a non-existent issue

evals.name: koto-not-installed
evals.expected_output: Agent resolves issue #10, reads it successfully, detects koto is not installed when running koto version, then installs koto using the install script before proceeding.
expectations: Agent reads issue #10 with gh issue view
Agent attempts to run koto version to check prerequisites
Agent detects that koto is not installed or not on PATH
Agent attempts to install koto using curl and the install script
Agent does NOT skip koto and fall back to manual orchestration
